name: 30 Groups
templateInstructions:
[auto_div_header] Edit only these text nodes:
    .pi-badge -> value of ACTIVE PI field, for example PI 28
    .header-title -> always the value of Roadmap Initiative Group field verbatim
    .header-stat-value (1st) -> Total Effort formatted with comma
    .header-stat-value (2nd) -> Initiative Count as integer
    .header-stat-value (3rd) -> Feature Count as integer

[auto_div_initiatives_table] Keep the table structure intact.
      Update the initiative rows and cell text only.
      Do not change the header labels, sorting attributes, or column order.
      Priority badge colors must strictly follow the template palette — do not introduce any other colors:
        P1 → background:#FF6359  (coral/red)
        P2 → background:#F0A500  (amber)
        P3 → background:#CCCCCC  (light gray, color:white)
        N/A → background:transparent; border:1px solid #CCCCCC; color:#888  (use class prio-na)

[div] Keep the two value cards and their structure intact.
      Update only the text content inside the cards.

[auto_div_business_value] Keep the Business Value card structure intact.
        Update only the bullet text.

[auto_div_market_relevance] Keep the Market Relevance card structure intact.
        Update only the bullet text.

selections.exampleHtml:
PI 28
Feature Catalog
Core Revenue Management Capabilities
Roadmap Initiative Group
23,200
Total Hours
10
Initiatives
35
Features

Initiative Status Features Priority Effort
Registration
Party identifiers, org hierarchy, search enhancements
 In Progress 14 P1 11,866h
Taxpayer Accounting
General ledger core, reconciliation & balance management
 In Analysis 9 P1 8,064h
Returns Processing
Filing workflows, validation rules, submission tracking & acknowledgements
 In Analysis 7 P1 4,320h
Payment Processing
Multi-channel payments, allocation rules & reconciliation engine
 In Analysis 6 P1 3,200h
Billing & Assessments
Instalment plans, assessment automation, billing cycles
 In Progress 6 P2 2,880h
Reporting & Analytics
Management dashboards, statutory reports, KPI tracking & exports
 In Progress 3 P2 1,760h
Penalty & Interest
Interest calculation, credit unallocated payment segments
 To Do 4 N/A TBD
Tax Accounts
Tax account setup, configurable thresholds, notifications
 To Do 2 P1 TBD
Debt Management
Debt recovery workflows, write-off management, enforcement actions
 To Do 5 P2 TBD
Audit & Compliance
Case management, audit trail logging, compliance monitoring & alerts
 To Do 4 P3 TBD
Business Value
Operational impact & delivery enablement
  • End-to-end taxpayer lifecycle management from registration through accounting and penalty enforcement
  • Automated billing, assessments & penalty calculations reduce manual caseworker effort across all tax types
  • Directly accelerates Greek project delivery and enables rapid reuse across future jurisdictions
Market Relevance
Strategic positioning & pipeline dependency
  • Core dependency for all current and pipeline Solon Tax implementations across multiple jurisdictions
  • Strengthens competitive position as a full-featured tax revenue management platform in active tenders
  • Platform completeness is a prerequisite condition cited in new-market RFP evaluation criteria

{"slides":{"slide_1":{"instances":[{"auto_div_header":"
PI 30
Feature Catalog
NON-FUNCTIONAL REQUIREMENT COVERAGE
Roadmap Initiative Group
6,870

6
Initiatives
13
Features
","auto_div_body":"
InitiativeStatusFeaturesPriorityEffort
MAINTAINABILITY
Kubernetes operator automation, Helm chart dependencies, documentation generation, release automation
To Do7P34,014h
USABILITY
AI-assisted capabilities for search, navigation, customer overview, and document management
To Do2P31,960h
ACCESSIBILITY
Compliance with accessibility standards (WCAG 2.1 AA and EN 301 549)
To Do1P3373h
TRACEABILITY
[Vanilla Installation] - Introduce OpenTelemetry observability support
To Do1P3392h
RELIABILITY
Analysis: When FTs/Journal Entries creation fails, admin can re-create them using a system process
To Do1P3131h
OPERABILITY
PD Documentation updates/enhancements for x.x.x (Current PI30)
To Do1N/ATBD
Business Value
Operational impact & delivery enablement
  • Automated Kubernetes operator and Helm chart dependencies reduce operational overhead and deployment complexity
  • OpenTelemetry observability modernization enables vendor-neutral telemetry collection across all system components
  • AI-assisted form schema generation and intelligent search capabilities significantly improve user experience and reduce manual effort
Market Relevance
Strategic positioning & pipeline dependency
  • WCAG 2.1 AA and EN 301 549 accessibility compliance addresses regulatory requirements across multiple jurisdictions
  • Modernized observability stack aligns with industry standards and supports integration with diverse monitoring platforms
  • Enhanced developer experience and maintainability strengthen platform reliability and reduce long-term support costs
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026Netcompany"},{"auto_div_header":"
PI30
Feature Catalog
CORE DATA HUB CAPABILITIES
Roadmap Initiative Group
5,973
Total Hours
2
Initiatives
2
Features
","auto_div_body":"
Initiative Status Features Priority Effort
AEOI, VIDA & OTHER DATA EXCHANGE
Vida PoC - Flow and example integrations
 To Do 1 P3 2,240h
AEOI, VIDA & OTHER DATA STORAGE
Data Storage - National DB - Central repository for all issued and received e-invoices
 To Do 1 P3 3,733h
Business Value
Operational impact & delivery enablement
  • Centralized e-invoice repository enables tax authorities to consolidate and control all issued and received invoices across national systems
  • Real-time data validation, fraud detection, and cross-border reconciliation via VIES 2.0 strengthen tax compliance and revenue collection
  • Immutable storage with audit trails and GDPR compliance ensures data integrity and supports regulatory requirements for tax control and audit readiness
Market Relevance
Strategic positioning & pipeline dependency
  • EU e-invoicing mandate (EN 16931, PEPPOL, VIES 2.0) creates urgent demand for integrated data exchange and storage solutions across Member States
  • Positions Solon Tax as a comprehensive digital reporting and data hub platform aligned with EU modernization initiatives
  • Enables revenue authorities to expand and consolidate legacy systems (mydata, SDI, SII) into a unified, scalable, standards-compliant infrastructure
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 Netcompany"},{"auto_div_header":"

Business Value
Operational impact & delivery enablement
  • Comprehensive security enablement across supply chain, application security, and compliance frameworks (CIS, NIST, SLSA, OWASP)
  • Structured training and knowledge transfer ensures team capability and reduces operational risk across all product lines
  • Governance, documentation, and management infrastructure enable scalable delivery and audit readiness
Market Relevance
Strategic positioning & pipeline dependency
  • Security and compliance posture is a critical differentiator in public sector tax software tenders and RFP evaluations
  • Proactive supply chain security and application security assurance reduce delivery risk and customer audit burden
  • Operational excellence through DevOps, documentation, and process maturity supports rapid deployment across jurisdictions
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026Netcompany"},{"auto_div_header":"

2,727
Total Hours
5
Initiatives
6
Features
","auto_div_body":"
InitiativeStatusFeaturesPriorityEffort
BATCH PROCESSING ENHANCEMENTS
Amplio batch migration and Java foundation 4.0 upgrade
To Do2P31,092h
DOCUMENT MANAGEMENT INTEGRATION
Generic component for embedded 3rd-party digital signature and document preview
Closed1P1104h
CASE MANAGEMENT
Integration with Luminus BRA and Audit support
To Do1P3392h
CONTACT MANAGEMENT
Support history of changes for contact when edited before sent
Waiting Analysis Approval1P3392h
REFERENCE DATA
Addition of validity period on relationships between codelist items
Under Analysis1P3747h
Business Value
Operational impact & delivery enablement
  • Modernizes batch processing infrastructure by migrating from SCDF to Amplio, improving scalability and maintainability
  • Enables flexible integration of third-party digital signature and document preview components for customer-specific implementations
  • Enhances contact and reference data management with comprehensive change history and temporal validity tracking
Market Relevance
Strategic positioning & pipeline dependency
  • Batch processing modernization supports operational efficiency requirements across all tax administration implementations
  • Generic widget framework for embedded components positions Solon as flexible platform for jurisdiction-specific compliance needs
  • Enhanced data management capabilities strengthen platform completeness for regulatory and audit requirements in target markets
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026Netcompany"},{"auto_div_header":"

REFERENCE IMPLEMENTATIONS
Roadmap Initiative Group

3
Initiatives
4
Features
","auto_div_body":"
InitiativeStatusFeaturesPriorityEffort
CIT
Submit a CIT Return on ICARUS Self Service
Under Analysis1P3130.9h
PAYE
PIT & Pay as you earn
To Do1P3392h
PIT
File Original and Amend Personal Income Tax Return from Self Service
Under Analysis2P3261.8h
Business Value
Operational impact & delivery enablement
  • Enables taxpayers to file and amend personal income tax returns and corporate income tax returns through self-service channels
  • Implements pay-as-you-earn logic with preliminary assessments, monthly reconciliation, and amendment processing for employers and taxpayers
  • Provides reference implementations for CIT, PIT, and PAYE tax types to accelerate deployment across multiple jurisdictions
Market Relevance

EXEMPTIONS
Policy-driven exclusions for assessments and liabilities; geographic, activity, party type and party size exemptions
To Do1P31,213h
Business Value
Operational impact & delivery enablement
  • Enables revenue authorities to implement lawful, policy-driven exclusions from tax obligations before liabilities arise, promoting fairness and development goals
  • Supports multiple exemption types—geographic, activity-based, party type, and party size—to encourage social/economic development and simplify tax administration
  • Provides comprehensive admin and user workflows for manual and bulk exemption application with full traceability, approvals, and legal documentation
Market Relevance
Strategic positioning & pipeline dependency
  • Differentiates Solon Tax as a complete revenue management platform with sophisticated policy-driven exemption capabilities required by modern tax administrations
  • Addresses critical functional gap between existing debt relief mechanisms (waivers, write-offs, suppressions) and legislated exemptions in jurisdictional requirements
  • Essential capability for competitive positioning in jurisdictions prioritizing fairness, sector development, and compliance with international tax policy standards
